[1] Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stipulated Order Staying Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Related Matters Before This Court; [2] Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

RESPONDENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA - HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES' Motion For Stipulated Order Staying Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Related Matters Before This Court is GRANTED per stipulation of the parties.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the adopted ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceeding not reported.
